productDisplayName: Yves Saint Laurent Men Kouros Perfume
description: Style NoteKouros by yves saint laurent is a soothing, aromatic fragrance for men with accents like aldehydes, artemisia, coriander, clary sage, bergamot, carnation, patchouli, cinnamon, orris root, jasmine, vetiver and geranium, honey, leather, tonka bean, amber, musk, civet, oakmoss and vanilla. Quantity: 100 mlCautionFlammableKeep away from sources of ignitionKeep away from childrenDo not use near fire, flame or heatAvoid spraying near the eyes
